payload.answer: I did not store this as memory because it is a policy-override instruction rather than a durable personal fact.

entity_resolution.reason: No valid entity or durable user fact was provided; the message is an instruction attempting to override memory policy.

details: Rejected an attempt to override memory policy.
No durable memory cards were created.
Preserved ambiguity by not inferring any user facts from the instruction.

repair_options: Send a concrete personal fact to remember, e.g. 'Remember that my manager is Alex.'
Send a preference or stable detail with clear scope and wording.
If you want ephemeral handling instead of memory, ask a normal question without using /brain remember.
